text:
Comment on attachment 251221
patch3

I'm afraid I'm going to have to report that after
testing, I found that this patch works as intended.

Kindly commit it.

Thank you Milan, and Tijl, for all your time and efforts on
all this!

My name is portmaster (Chris Hutchinson), and I approve this patch.
(sorry, you'd probably have to live in the US, to understand the
attempted humor in that last statement). ;)

--Chris
